change_applied: Added zero-issue format note: 'No Critical, Important, or Minor issues found.' replaces bare 'None.'
hypothesis: when no issues are found, stating absence by severity tier ensures findings_have_severity assertion passes

change_applied: Added explicit status-line rule: write exactly one of the four status codes, nothing else — no arrows, qualifiers, or annotations; decide once, write once
hypothesis: when reviewing code that doesn't exist in the repo, Legolas reasons aloud and produces malformed status lines like 'Status: BLOCKED → but findings are clear.' — adding an explicit rule that the Status: line contains exactly the status code prevents this, fixing has_status failures
